Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add high-performance Avro to Parquet service

- HTTP service with Axum for accepting Avro payloads
- Avro to Arrow schema and value conversion
- Parquet file writing with configurable compression
- Endpoints: /health, /schema, /write/:schema_name, /write-raw
- Unit and integration tests for all modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
